Notice Of Motion For Order Pursuant To Ccp Section 2033.280(B); Request For Fees And Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Dection 2023.010(B0 And 2023.030; Declaration
Off Calendar Mar-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Susan Zeme's Motion For Order Pursuant To C.C.P. Section 2033.280(b) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions, Set No. One, are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $525, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
